telegramChatId.title: Telegram chat ID
telegramChatId.description: Your numeric chat ID (get it from @userinfobot). Stored encrypted.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: Use a residential proxy so the site sees a normal UK home visitor instead of a blocked datacenter IP.

alertOnRecovery.title: Send an 'all good again' message after a failure
alertOnRecovery.description: If on, sends a recovery notification the first time the site is healthy again after a failure.

navigationTimeoutSecs.title: Page load timeout (seconds)
navigationTimeoutSecs.description: How long to wait for the page before treating it as a failure.
